action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ResNet-50 DDP (10 epochs, lr=0.001, batch=96/GPU) achieved Quickdraw accuracy 0.0959, val_acc 0.6315. Loss still declining, validation accuracy improving. Domain imbalance (Real 172k vs Clipart 48k) likely biases the model. Analysis: Quickdraw extreme domain gap demands longer training, domain-aware weighting, and augmentations that mimic sketch-like inputs (grayscale). Decision: Scale to 30 epochs, lr=0.01 (standard finetuning), batch 128/GPU, add domain inverse-frequency loss weighting and RandomGrayscale augmentation. Submit eval in same iteration to save iteration budget.
